label: Public Safety
description: Crime, violence, robbery, and public safety threats
steps: Move to a safe location away from the threat
Call police at 100 or emergency number 112
Do not resist if weapons are involved — comply for safety
Note descriptions: clothing, vehicle, direction of escape
Wait for police at a safe distance from the incident
guidance: Provide your exact location and nature of the threat to police
Preserve the crime scene if safe — do not touch evidence
If witnessing a crime, stay hidden and call police immediately
Request an FIR number when filing a complaint
Use 112 app to share live location with emergency services

helplines.name: Unified Emergency Number
helplines.description: Single emergency number for all services
